sentences.arabic: لِلْكِبَارِ مَكَانَةٌ عَالِيَةٌ فِي الْعَائِلَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stariji imaju visok status u arapskoj porodici.
sentences.translationEn: Elders hold a high status in the Arab family.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَرِمُ الْأَبْنَاءُ آبَاءَهُمْ وَأَجْدَادَهُمْ وَيَطْلُبُونَ مِنْهُمُ النَّصِيحَةَ.
sentences.translation: Djeca poštuju svoje roditelje i djedove te traže njihov savjet.
sentences.translationEn: Children respect their parents and grandparents and seek their advice.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ الْكَبِيرُ فِي مَكَانٍ مُتَمَيِّزٍ وَيَبْدَأُ الطَّعَامَ قَبْلَ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Starija osoba sjedi na počasnom mjestu i počinje jesti prije ostalih.
sentences.translationEn: The eldest sits in a place of honour and starts eating before others.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَقِدُ الْعَائِلَاتُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ أَنَّ خِبْرَةَ الْكِبَارِ كَنْزٌ ثَمِينٌ لَا يُقَدَّرُ بِثَمَنٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapske porodice smatraju da je iskustvo starijih dragocjeno blago koje se ne može procijenit cijenom.
sentences.translationEn: Arab families believe that the experience of elders is a priceless treasure.
